2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_buffer_register_bvec(), which allows registering an array of bio vectors (bvecs) to the io_uring context. The function is designed for use in fuse-over-io-uring zero-copy operations and provides a way to register multiple bvecs at once. It takes several parameters, including the io_uring command, the bvec array, and flags for issue and release. The patch also adds an inline function for the case where the feature is not supported. The new function is implemented in the io_uring/rsrc.c file and includes error handling and locking to ensure thread safety.
